content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(0, 8, 4), (0, 7, 7), (7, 9, 8), (1, 2, 10), (1, 4, 12), (4, 8, 12), (5, 6, 12), (2, 8, 15), (6, 8, 15), (1, 8, 16), (0, 5, 18), (5, 8, 19), (6, 9, 19), (2, 7, 20), (3, 4, 22), (2, 5, 23), (2, 4, 24), (7, 8, 27), (2, 3, 28)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 23.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 23:

* Edge (0, 8, 4) has node 0 and time 23. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 7, 7) has node 0 and time 23. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (7, 9, 8) has node 7 and time 8. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 2, 10) has node 1 and time 10. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (1, 4, 12) has node 1 and time 12. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (4, 8, 12) has node 4 and time 12. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 6, 12) has node 5 and time 12. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 8, 15) has node 2 and time 15. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 8, 15) has node 6 and time 15. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 8, 16) has node 1 and time 16. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 5, 18) has node 0 and time 18. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (5, 8, 19) has node 5 and time 19. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 9, 19) has node 6 and time 19. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 7, 20) has node 2 and time 20. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 4, 22) has node 3 and time 22. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (2, 5, 23) has node 2 and time 23. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 4, 24) has node 2 and time 24. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (7, 8, 27) has node 7 and time 27. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 3, 28) has node 2 and time 28. -> Add node 3.

The nodes matched are 8, 7, 9, 2, 4, 5, 6, 8, 16, 5, 8, 19, 6, 9, 20, 4, 3, 28.

Answer: [8, 7, 9, 2, 4, 5, 6, 8, 16, 5, 8, 19, 6, 9, 20, 4, 3, 28]
